title: Genoplesium acuminatum
taxonomy: Genoplesium acuminatum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 30,000 species of orchids. This epiphytic orchid is native to Australia and is commonly found in the eastern and southern regions. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Genoplesium acuminatum is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Genoplesium is a small group of terrestrial orchids that are commonly found in Australia. Within the Genoplesium genus, Genoplesium acuminatum is distinguished by its unique, pointed flower spikes and greenish-brown flower color.
